_comment: Curated placements that TAKE PRECEDENCE over the OSM geocode. Two cases: (a) institutions OpenStreetMap can't find by name AND whose MESRS title names no wilaya (mostly Algiers/Koléa grandes écoles named by discipline); (b) corrections where a discipline-only name geocoded to the wrong same-named school (ENP → the El Harrach original, not ENP Constantine; UFC → its Alger seat, not a Tipaza match). Each asserts a `commune` (resolved by fetch.mjs to its flagship centroid → geo_precision "commune") or, where the exact commune is uncertain, a bare `wilaya_code` (→ centroid, geo_precision "wilaya"). Communes verified against the flagship; locations cross-checked against each institution's own website. Coordinates are never typed here — only the place name is.
